predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves ascendants or close collaterals.

predicates.name: is_share_in_common_or_exclusive_undivided_estate
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the deceased (second argument) in the common estate or in the estate exclusively in undivided co-ownership with the surviving spouse (third argument).

predicates.name: is_other_asset_of_own_estate
predicates.description: The asset is among the other assets of the deceased person's own estate.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_return
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return referred to in article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: otherwise_provided_in_donation_or_will
predicates.description: It is otherwise provided in the deed of donation or in the will regarding the asset.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership
predicates.description: The person acquires full ownership of the asset.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct
predicates.description: The person acquires the usufruct of the asset.
